indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for stretching without obstructions.

indicators.name: soft lighting
indicators.rationale: Soft lighting creates a calming atmosphere suitable for yoga.

indicators.name: couches and chairs
indicators.rationale: Couches and chairs block the open floor space and create visual clutter.

reasoning_summary: The open floor space and soft lighting support yoga, but the presence of couches and chairs obstructs the open area and creates visual clutter, reducing the overall suitability to 3 out of 7.
